defaults.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, blurry, distorted, deformed hands, extra limbs, low quality, warped faces, oversaturated, cartoonish

scenes.prompt: Aerial sunrise over modern Cairo in 2026, the Nile winding past glass high-rises and lit suspension bridges, feluccas and motorboats on the water, soft morning haze, warm golden light.
The New Administrative Capital at midday, gleaming futuristic skyscrapers and the Iconic Tower, a sleek monorail gliding past palm-lined boulevards, clean reflective glass, blue sky.
Bustling modern Cairo street at golden hour, neon shop signs, people in everyday clothes holding smartphones, street food vendors and parked cars, lively crowd, cinematic shallow depth of field.
Pyramids of Giza at sunset beside the illuminated Grand Egyptian Museum, tourists strolling, a camera drone in the sky, warm orange light fading to dusk.
